headline: Is Essex Property Trust, Inc. (ESS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ESS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Essex Property Trust, Inc. on The Dividend Prince’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ESS. Essex Property Trust, Inc.’s share was trading at $295.34 as of June 26th. ESS’s trailing and forward P/E were 33.22 and 52.63 respectively […]
